final:
module sync_up_counter_8bit_with_reset (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire en,
    output reg [7:0] count
);
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 8'b00000000;
        end else if (en) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
